w:r.w:t: ACDB / DCDB / MCB Box / Busbar / Panel Box
ACDB / DCDB / MCB Box / Busbar / Panel Box
Quotation will be valid for up to 7 days.
Products once sold are not eligible for return or exchange.
Cost of superstructure will be extra @ ₹2000 per kW (if required).
Any difference in inverter cost will be charged extra as per the actual amount paid by the customer.
Operation and maintenance are included for 5 years in the above cost.
solar plant is 16 × 36 feet or 24 × 24 feet.
The inverter will be installed from any available brand, subject to availability.
Quotation will be valid for up to 7 days.
Products once sold are not eligible for return or exchange.
Cost of superstructure will be extra @ ₹2000 per kW (if required).
Any difference in inverter cost will be charged extra as per the actual amount paid by the customer.
Operation and maintenance are included for 5 years in the above cost.
solar plant is 16 × 36 feet or 24 × 24 feet.
The inverter will be installed from any available brand, subject to availability.
Cheque/Demand Draft should be drawn in Favor of
